mentions.note: Turnaround accelerating under CEO Kesha Steelman; up 27% since October but momentum intact. For October buyers: hold and congrats. For new buyers: excellent story but wait for pullback.
Higher quality than Oddity after weak quarter; acceptable entry point.
Bargain offerings, real bargains; same as Dollar General—unless oil insane, these work; will go higher if crude stabilizes.
Cosmetics retailer, reports tomorrow; Cramer likes it but hesitant to 'put gun to head.' Buy some now, buy more post-earnings if thesis intact.

Turnaround credible: TikTok channel live (46.7M loyalty members), wellness expansion (GLP-1, sleep, nutrition), SpaceNK prestige acquisition synergies. CEO Kesha Steelman focused on growth + SGNA discipline in 2026. Multi-tier model (mass-to-luxury) recession-resistant. Target 50M loyalty members.
Strong same-store sales, turnaround evident on-ground; CEO driving growth, wellness expansion, TikTok integration—bright spot in retail.
Down 15% YTD with analyst cutting price target ahead of Wednesday quarter; weakness suggests potential earnings miss.
